meaning: adj.凭手画的n.徒手画n.adj.徒手画(的)
examples: The themes can be figures, landscapes, flowers and birds, and the techniques can be divided into figurative painting and freehand painting.
Ideogramic also allows freehand drawings on diagrams.
In other parts of the painting, Mondrian clearly painted freehand, with no paper to guide him.
Around noon, henna artists find a moment of calm to plonk down stools and draw intricate temporary tattoos freehand.
The couple have been freehand painters since 1974 but are worried that the skill is a dying art.
